heroSubheadline: Run short experiments on yourself and discover what actually works.
heroBody:
Human Lab turns self-improvement into structured, science-backed experiments. Pick a category—stress, sleep, energy, or habits—follow a guided study for 7 to 45 days, check in daily, and see whether the change made a real difference for you.

No miracle claims. No generic advice. Just your data, your experiments, and an AI scientist in your corner.
badgeText: Coming soon to the App Store
problem: Trying interventions without knowing whether they actually work for you
solution: Human Lab helps you run short, science-backed experiments on yourself. Pick a category, follow a structured study, check in daily, and discover what actually works for your stress, sleep, energy, and habits.
targetAudience: curious self-improvers who want evidence—not guesswork

benefits.title: 7–45 day studies
benefits.description: Structured experiments with clear start and end dates.

benefits.title: Real data
benefits.description: Daily check-ins build a personal evidence base.

benefits.title: AI lab scientist
benefits.description: Guidance and encouragement grounded in research.

features.title: Science-backed experiment catalog
features.description: Browse curated experiments with peer-reviewed sources—not influencer hype. Each study links to real research so you know why you're testing something.

features.title: Structured daily check-ins
features.description: Complete short check-ins during your experiment. Track adherence, mood, and outcomes without spreadsheets or guesswork.

features.title: Category-based lab
features.description: Choose what you want to improve—stress, sleep, energy, nutrition, focus, and more. Each category offers experiments sized for real life.

features.title: Your AI lab scientist
features.description: Get guidance, encouragement, and context as you run experiments. The mad-scientist mascot keeps the process playful while staying grounded in evidence.

features.title: Clear results
features.description: When your experiment ends, review what happened. See whether the intervention worked for you—not for an average user in a marketing slide.

screenshots.title: Stop guessing. Start testing.
screenshots.description: Choose a category and enter the lab.

screenshots.title: See what actually worked
screenshots.description: Review outcomes backed by your data.

pricing.finePrint: $6.99/month after a 7-day free trial. Cancel anytime.

emailCapture.headline: Ready to run your first experiment?
emailCapture.subheadline: Start testing what actually works—for you.

items.question: What is Human Lab?
items.answer: Human Lab is a self-experimentation app for iOS. You pick a science-backed experiment, run it for a set number of days, check in daily, and review whether it actually improved your target outcome.

items.question: How is this different from a habit tracker?
items.answer: Habit trackers help you repeat behaviors. Human Lab helps you test whether a specific intervention works for you—with a start date, end date, daily data, and a results summary. Think n-of-1 experiment, not endless streaks.

items.question: Do I need to be a scientist to use it?
items.answer: No. Experiments are pre-designed with plain-language instructions and linked research. You follow the protocol, log check-ins, and review results when the study completes.

items.question: How much does it cost?
items.answer: Human Lab offers a 7-day free trial, then $6.99/month. Cancel anytime from your account settings. Pricing may change before public launch—see the landing page for current terms.

items.question: Is my data private?
items.answer: Your experiment data is yours. We do not sell personal health data. A full privacy policy will be published before launch.

items.question: What platforms are supported?
items.answer: The full product targets iOS. This package includes an interactive web mockup for validation—the landing page embeds the deployed mockup URL; it does not import mockup source code directly.

seo.title: Human Lab — Stop guessing. Start testing.
seo.description: Run short science-backed experiments on yourself. Discover what actually works for stress, sleep, energy, and habits.
